nodes.label: AI as creative refreshment for reports
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me freshen things up on the creative side

nodes.label: AI as verification tool for accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to verify what I have found and suggest changes

nodes.label: AI as workload reducer for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: tasking AI with the processing of repetitive, daily tasks that just take time, not brainpower

nodes.label: Personal groundwork for authenticity in client interactions
nodes.label_negative: AI doing all work leading to lack of authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: doing the groundwork yourself to maintain authenticity in client interactions

nodes.label: Company restriction on AI use
nodes.grounding_span: restricted to using AI the way the company allows

nodes.label: Professional confidence and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: gives me the highest confidence when I am entering presentations, negotiations or contract reviews

nodes.label: Work-life balance and mental capacity
nodes.grounding_span: if AI can help to shed some workload and free up mental capacity, that can only be a good thing

nodes.label: Authentic human interaction in business
nodes.grounding_span: having that genuine interaction means a lot

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for creative refreshment
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me freshen things up on the creative side which has helped with both my interest in doing the work, and user engagement

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as verification tool
nodes.grounding_span: using AI to verify, which is unbelievably helpful and reassuring that my findings were correct

nodes.label: Frustration with company restrictions on AI
nodes.grounding_span: restricted to using AI the way the company allows

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption after leadership change
nodes.grounding_span: if the dynamic were to shift with these new appointments, it could see AI adopted more freely across the business

nodes.label: Concern about losing authenticity if AI does all work
nodes.grounding_span: using AI to do all of the work would lead to a stale presentation and ... I would likely stumble over my words

nodes.label: Methodical verification approach — cross-checking findings with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I then upload the document ... and ask a series of questions ... to confirm that my findings ... are accurate

nodes.label: Strategic patience — waiting for organizational change to expand AI use
nodes.grounding_span: We do have 3 senior management members due for retirement ... if the dynamic were to shift ... it could see AI adopted more freely
